input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule V.4.2.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: v.4.2.3
            TITLE: if used, aluminum wheel nuts must be hard anodized and in pristine condition.

            CONTENT:
            rule V.4.2.3: If used, aluminum wheel nuts must be hard anodized and in pristine condition.
V.4.2.3 If used, aluminum wheel nuts must be hard anodized and in pristine condition.
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 22 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: If used, aluminum wheel nuts must be hard anodized and in pristine condition.
